title: EXTEKK Luxe v2 — re-imagined with 2026 design playbook (4-agent)

spec.label: architect
spec.prompt:
You are designing a re-imagined, BREATHTAKING landing page for EXTEKK — a premium Discord security bot. The previous v1 build (deployed at claudegravity.site) was competent but flat — Inter at large sizes, basic gradient text, small terminal panel, plain counter cards, generic dark theme, border-radius everywhere. The user's verdict: 'in Google Stitch with one prompt I'd make better.'

This v2 must feel like a 2026 Awwwards-Site-of-the-Day candidate.

## Required design references (MUST acknowledge in your ## Concept)
You MUST emulate the visual signature of these specific sites. Read each before responding. Reference at least one named visual move from each in your ## Concept section (one sentence per reference):
  1. linear.app — depth via blur + gradient blobs, refined Inter pairing
  2. tailscale.com — hacker-credibility without toxic neon, mono-meets-serif
  3. oxide.computer — tactile brutalism, 0px radius, monospace-as-display

Key product facts (from the original site):
- EXTEKK is a Discord security & server-insurance bot.
- Restores nuked servers in 1 second (channels, categories, roles, vouches).
- AI engine for scam-prevention + auto-moderation.
- Features: OAuth2 Member & Server Restore, 1-click Aesthetic Server Builder & Lockdown, Pro Ticket System, EXTEKK Sentinel (auto-mod patrolling chat 24/7, deletes phishing, mutes spammers), Universal Vouch Vault & Reputation, Global Scammer Blacklist.
- Stats: 23.4K bot downloads, 11.6K premium customers, 24/7 active support, 5-star overall.
- The new site must NOT be a shop — marketing only. Primary goal: 'Add to Discord'.

Output a tight Markdown spec with EXACTLY these section headings, in order:

## Concept
2 sentences with the brand promise. Then 3 sentences explicitly naming a visual move borrowed from each of the three reference sites above.

## Tone
3 adjectives describing the writing voice. Hacker-couture, security-first, no fluff.

## Information architecture
8-10 sections in order, each with one-line purpose.

## Hero copy
Headline (max 8 words, BREATHTAKING — must read like a thriller film tagline), sub-headline (one sentence ≤ 18 words), primary CTA label (≤ 3 words), secondary CTA label (≤ 3 words), uptime/status pill text.

## Watch-it-work — 3 steps
For each: state name + one-line description + timing pill (0.000s, 0.420s, 1.000s). Heist-movie cadence.

## Live numbers — 4 cards
Label + final number + supporting unit. Numbers will animate from 0 on viewport entry.

## Feature grid — 6 cards (BENTO LAYOUT, NOT 3-column)
For each: 1-2 word ALL CAPS title, ≤ 14-word description, icon keyword. The bento layout is required: ONE large hero cell, two medium, three small — never six equal cells.

## Terminal demo — copy for code blocks
Three side-by-side terminal blocks. Each: `$ ` shell prompt + 3-5 output lines with timestamps + ✓ ticks + durations. Real EXTEKK CLI: `extekk restore`, `extekk lockdown`, `extekk vouches sync`. Hero terminal must do REAL letter-by-letter typing animation — call it out in the spec.

## Testimonials — 3 fixed quotes
Not a marquee. For each: 2-sentence quote in Discord-seller / community-mod tone, persona (`@handle`, role), green-check 'verified purchase' tag.

## Pricing — 2 tiers
Free (everything that exists today) and Pro ($19/mo, 14-day free trial). Each: header, 6 feature bullets (✓ or ✗), single CTA label, 'most popular' tag on Pro.

## FAQ — 5 questions
Real concerns, ≤ 30-word answers each, confident not defensive. Use <details><summary> for accordion.

## Final CTA
One-line invitation + button label. ≤ 12 words total. Tagline must read like a heist-movie ending.

## Footer
5 nav links, social (Discord, GitHub), legal, single ALL CAPS hacker-tagline above copyright.

## Color palette — STRICT
- Background: pure obsidian (#000000 — NOT #0f1115)
- Foreground hierarchy: white at 100% / 70% / 45% / 20% — NEVER colored gray
- Acid accent: pick ONE of [#00ffe0 cyan, #00ff94 mint, #caff00 chartreuse, #ff2bd6 magenta]. Justify in one sentence.
- Acid usage: primary CTA, ONE hero word highlighted, status dot, hover state — nothing else.
- A subtle red for breach indicator (#ff3b5c or similar).
- DO NOT use a pastel gradient. DO NOT use three brand colors. DO NOT use purple-blue.

## Type stack — STRICT
Two Google Fonts. Pair an editorial display (Fraunces, Playfair Display, IBM Plex Serif, Anton, Geist) with a monospace (JetBrains Mono, Geist Mono, IBM Plex Mono). NEVER pair two sans-serifs. Justify the contrast in one sentence. Specify which has variable-font axes (wght / wdth) for scroll-driven modulation.

Be opinionated. No hedging. Every choice must feel inevitable.

spec.label: designer
spec.prompt:
OUTPUT MODE: TEXT ONLY. No tools. No write_file. No sub-agent delegation. Respond with raw text only.

You are the lead designer for EXTEKK Luxe v2. The architect's spec defines IA + copy + colors + fonts. Your job: turn it into a 2026 Awwwards-tier visual system.

## STRICT DO-NOTs (failing any voids the spec)
- DO NOT use border-radius > 0px on cards, buttons, sections, panels. ONLY status pills get border-radius: 999px.
- DO NOT use box-shadow for depth. Depth comes from overlap + 1px borders + animated gradient blobs.
- DO NOT use pastel gradients in the hero.
- DO NOT use a 3-equal-column 'features' grid with identical icons (the architect's bento layout is REQUIRED).
- DO NOT use a 'trusted by' logo wall directly under the hero.
- DO NOT use border-radius: 12px (or any non-zero radius) on more than 3 elements site-wide.

Output ONLY these sections:

## Logo
A self-contained <svg viewBox='0 0 320 80'>. The wordmark 'EXTEKK' in display sans + a tiny accent geometric mark (stylized shield, terminal cursor, or angular insignia — pick the most unforgettable). White wordmark on transparent background. NO emoji, NO smiley faces. Output the full SVG ready to paste.

## Color tokens
A CSS :root block with: --bg-0 (#000000 pure obsidian), --bg-1 (raised, #0a0a0a), --bg-2 (panel, #141414), --fg-0 (white), --fg-1 (white 70%), --fg-2 (white 45%), --fg-3 (white 20%), --accent (the architect's acid), --accent-glow (rgba 60% accent), --alert (red), --border (rgba 8% white), --grid (rgba 4% accent for the background grid). Plus radius scale (--r-0 0px, --r-pill 999px — and ONLY these, no 4/8/12px values), and spacing scale (--s-1 4px through --s-7 96px clean ladder).

## Typography
@import line for the architect-picked Google Fonts. Base scale (h1, h2, h3, body, mono, micro) with concrete sizes + line-heights + letter-spacing. h1 must be `clamp(72px, 11vw, 160px)`, line-height 0.92, letter-spacing -0.04em. Body 17px. Mono 14px. h2 clamp(40px, 5vw, 72px).

## Layout sketches — three states
For each: STATE NAME + 2-sentence purpose + a self-contained inline <svg viewBox='0 0 1280 720'>. Real labels, real numbers, real button copy from architect's hero copy. SVGs ≥ 1280×720, no placeholder text:
  1. ASYMMETRIC HERO (full viewport): edge-to-edge headline LEFT at clamp(72px, 11vw, 160px), animated terminal panel RIGHT, 2-3 animated gradient blobs in background (filter: blur 140px), subtle SVG noise overlay, status pill 'ALL SYSTEMS NOMINAL · 99.99% UPTIME'.
  2. WATCH IT WORK (asymmetric layout): 3-card timeline ATTACK DETECTED → RESTORE INITIATED → SERVER REBUILT, with timing pills 0.000s / 0.420s / 1.000s, arrow connectors. The middle card is intentionally OFF-CENTER vertically (broken grid) for premium feel.
  3. BENTO FEATURE GRID: ONE large hero cell (oauth restore) + two medium (sentinel + builder) + three small (tickets + vouch vault + blacklist). 1px solid borders, no shadows, no rounded corners. Different cell heights.

## Motion
6 specific animations with cubic-bezier curves and durations. ALL must use cubic-bezier — never `ease`:
  - hero terminal letter-by-letter typing (0.06s per char, no easing — feels mechanical)
  - scroll-driven variable-font weight modulation on hero h1 (wght 700 → 300 as scrollY 0 → window.innerHeight)
  - blob mesh drift (32s ease-in-out infinite, 2 pseudo-elements with filter: blur 140px)
  - SVG noise translation (600ms ease-in-out infinite, 5px translate, opacity 0.06, mix-blend-mode: overlay)
  - number counter roll-up (1200ms cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1), IntersectionObserver triggered)
  - cursor-following radial-gradient glow on feature cards (transform: translate(var(--mx), var(--my)) on mousemove)

## Mood
3 sentences. Confident, premium, hacker-couture. NOT noisy, NOT toxic neon. Refined.

## Spec
{{architect}}

spec.label: engineer
spec.prompt:
Implement the EXTEKK Luxe v2 landing page as a single static site — no framework, no build step. Pure HTML + CSS + JS that drops into /var/www/extekk-luxe/.

For every file, output a fenced code block whose FIRST line is a comment with the file path:
  - HTML: `<!-- index.html -->`
  - CSS: `/* style.css */`
  - JS: `// script.js`
  - SVG: `<!-- logo.svg -->`
  - JSON: `<!-- manifest.json -->` then the JSON

Files, in order: index.html, style.css, script.js, logo.svg, manifest.json, robots.txt.

Use VERBATIM from upstream:
  - Color tokens from {{designer}} (paste the :root block as the FIRST thing in style.css)
  - Logo SVG from {{designer}} verbatim into logo.svg
  - Typography pairing from {{designer}} (the @import + scale)
  - All on-screen copy from {{architect}} verbatim

---

## NON-NEGOTIABLE 12-POINT CHECKLIST — ALL REQUIRED OR DO NOT SUBMIT

The output MUST satisfy ALL twelve. Self-audit before emitting any file. If you cannot honestly tick all 12, state which are missing at the bottom of your response and we will reject.

[1]  Hero headline ≥ clamp(72px, 11vw, 160px) font-size. Edge-to-edge.
[2]  At least one variable-font axis modulation (wght / wdth / slnt) responsive to scroll progress via JS `scroll` listener OR CSS `scroll-timeline`. The hero h1 is the obvious target.
[3]  At least one scroll-driven section transformation using `IntersectionObserver` or `scroll-timeline` (CSS) — NOT a setTimeout. Apply to the bento section AND the watch-it-work timeline.
[4]  At least one cursor-driven micro-interaction. Implementation must use `mousemove` event with CSS custom properties (`--mx`, `--my`) updated per frame. Apply to feature cards (radial-gradient glow that follows cursor).
[5]  Animated noise / film-grain overlay using SVG `feTurbulence` data URI. position: fixed, mix-blend-mode: overlay, opacity 4-8%, animated translate via @keyframes 600ms ease-in-out infinite for the 'alive' film feel.
[6]  Bento section (NOT 3-equal-column features). One large hero cell + two medium + three small. CSS Grid with `grid-template-areas` or hand-tuned column/row spans.
[7]  At least 2 animated gradient blobs in the hero. position: absolute pseudo-elements, border-radius: 50%, filter: blur(140px), opacity 0.4, mix-blend-mode: screen, slow drift via @keyframes 32s ease-in-out infinite.
[8]  border-radius: 0 on ALL cards/buttons/sections. ONLY status pills may use border-radius: 999px. Verify at submission — search your CSS for any non-zero non-999px border-radius and remove.
[9]  No box-shadow ANYWHERE for depth. Use overlap and 1px borders. Search your CSS for box-shadow before submitting.
[10] Single accent color with ≥ 3 white-tint steppes (100/70/45/20). NO colored grays. Verify your :root block uses ONLY one accent + white tints + obsidian.
[11] All animations use cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1) for entrances, cubic-bezier(0.65, 0, 0.35, 1) for exits. Search your CSS for `ease`, `ease-in`, `ease-out`, `linear` and replace EXCEPT where physically necessary (typing animation can be linear).
[12] @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) disables ALL kinetic: typing, blob drift, noise translate, scroll-driven font modulation, cursor glow, counter roll-up.

## Anti-patterns (instant rejection — search your code before submitting)
- Glass-morphism panels with backdrop-filter: blur AND a soft white tint AND rounded corners — this is 2021–22.
- Stock photography for any non-product image.
- Drop shadows for card depth.
- Border-radius 12px on more than 3 elements site-wide.
- 'Features' section as 3 equal columns with same icon size.
- 'Trusted by' logo wall placed directly under the hero.

## Sections to implement, in order:
  1. Sticky glass nav (1px bottom border at --border, NO backdrop-filter blur — that's 2022 — use a 95% obsidian background instead). Logo left, links centre, primary CTA right, mobile burger.
  2. ASYMMETRIC HERO (full viewport): edge-to-edge headline LEFT, animated terminal panel RIGHT (macOS chrome — three colored dots top-left), 2 animated gradient blobs behind, SVG noise overlay on top, status pill at top. Variable-font scroll modulation on h1.
  3. WATCH IT WORK timeline: 3 cards horizontal, middle card off-center vertically by 24px (broken grid). Timing pills count up via IntersectionObserver. ATTACK DETECTED card has red border + alert pulse.
  4. LIVE NUMBERS: 4 counter cards. Numbers animate from 0 to final on viewport entry (1.2s cubic-bezier).
  5. BENTO ARSENAL: 6 capabilities in a 4-column × 2-row bento grid. ONE cell spans 2x2 (oauth restore — the hero cell), two span 2x1 (sentinel + builder), three span 1x1 (tickets + vouch vault + blacklist). 1px borders, no shadows, no rounded corners. Cursor-following radial-gradient glow per cell.
  6. TERMINAL DEMO: 3 side-by-side macOS-style terminal panels. Mono font, syntax-coloured prompts and ✓ ticks. Real EXTEKK commands from architect.
  7. TESTIMONIALS: 3 fixed cards in a row. Quote, persona, verified-purchase pill. NOT a marquee.
  8. PRICING: 2 cards side-by-side. Free vs Pro. Feature matrix with ✓/✗. Pro card has a subtle accent-glow border AND 'most popular' status pill.
  9. FAQ: 5 <details><summary> accordion items. Open one by default.
 10. FINAL CTA: single huge headline at clamp(56px, 8vw, 112px) + Discord-blue button.
 11. FOOTER: 5 nav, social (Discord+GitHub icons), legal, ALL CAPS hacker tagline.

## Global
  - prefers-reduced-motion respected.
  - Mobile responsive at 768 / 480 breakpoints. Bento collapses to single column on mobile.
  - Smooth scroll on anchor links.
  - All interactive elements have visible focus rings (--accent outline).
  - SEO: <meta name='description'>, OG tags, theme-color = the accent.
  - Manifest: name 'EXTEKK', short_name 'EXTEKK', start_url '/', display 'standalone', theme_color = accent, background_color = '#000000'.

No TODO. No placeholder strings. Real working page on first load.

## Spec
{{architect}}

## Design
{{designer}}

spec.label: operator
spec.prompt:
OUTPUT MODE: TEXT ONLY. No tools (no write_file, no read_file, no run_shell_command, no sub-agent delegation). Respond with raw text only.

Write README.md and a single deploy snippet. Output as fenced blocks with file-path first-line comments:

  <!-- README.md -->
  Title 'EXTEKK Luxe v2'
  Tagline (≤ 12 words, hacker-couture)
  3 sentences: what-it-is, design language (mention 2026 trends — tactile brutalism, chromatic extremes, scroll-driven typography), and how-it-was-built (mention ClaudeGravity 4-agent pipeline + LUXE-DESIGN-PLAYBOOK)
  '## Live' section pointing to https://claudegravity.site and https://claudegravity.online
  '## Run locally' section: open index.html in any browser
  Browser support note (modern Chromium / Firefox / Safari 16+, variable fonts required)
  '## Source provenance' note: re-imagined version of extekk.mysellauth.com — design + code generated end-to-end through ClaudeGravity, design language enforced by docs/LUXE-DESIGN-PLAYBOOK.md
  License: MIT one-liner

  <!-- deploy.sh -->
  #!/bin/bash
  Single rsync line uploading to root@46.36.39.161:/var/www/extekk-luxe/, plus `ssh hukot 'systemctl reload caddy'` at the end.

Keep it tight. No prose between blocks.
